rows.need: bind numeric range endpoints and inclusive/exclusive semantics
rows.title: Range Endpoint / Inclusive Lens

rows.need: defer pronoun-dependent claims when the antecedent is ambiguous
rows.title: Pronoun Antecedent Guard

rows.need: separate added requests from the original task before planning work
rows.title: Scope Creep Request Lens

rows.need: keep preferences and opinions separate from measured facts
rows.title: Objective / Subjective Split Lens

rows.need: preserve ordered event chains before rendering progress or causal summaries
rows.title: Timeline Chain Lens

rows.need: preserve privacy boundary before exposing or using information
rows.title: Private / Public Boundary Guard

rows.need: preserve inequality direction before filtering or answering numeric constraints
rows.title: Inequality Direction Guard

rows.need: require unit context before comparing or transforming numeric values
rows.title: Unit Conversion Context Guard

rows.need: bind aggregate values to their granularity and grouping
rows.title: Aggregation Granularity Lens

rows.need: bind stated preference and tradeoff direction before choosing an action
rows.title: Tradeoff / Preference Lens

rows.need: preserve tie and ordering rules before selecting winners
rows.title: Rank Order / Tie Guard

rows.need: keep analogies and metaphors from becoming literal mechanistic claims
rows.title: Metaphor / Literal Boundary Guard

rows.need: bind user preference constraints to the current task plan
rows.title: User Preference / Constraint Lens

rows.need: keep negation inside the relevant list item instead of leaking it to neighbors
rows.title: List Item Negative Scope Guard

rows.need: bind numbered steps to sequence order and prevent skipped-step completion
rows.title: Step Numbering / Sequence Lens

rows.need: ground whether data is processed as a batch, stream, chunk, or overlapping frame
rows.title: Batch / Stream Boundary Lens
